framework.name: IETF Agent Auth Draft (klrc-aiagent-auth-00)
framework.description: Individual I-D (NOT working group adopted, no stream, no intended RFC status) proposing agents-as-workloads model using WIMSE, OAuth 2.0, SPIFFE, and OpenID SSF. No new protocols — composes existing standards. Covers identity, credentials, attestation, auth, monitoring, compliance. Filed 2026-03-02.
framework.raw_quote: This I-D is not endorsed by the IETF and has no formal standing in the IETF standards process.

source.title: draft-klrc-aiagent-auth-00 - AI Agent Authentication and Authorization
